series_metadata.series_description: These are records of consumer complaints filed against credit unions regulated by the Division of Financial Institutions and include all correspondence relating to the complaint.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for five (5) years following the date the complaint is closed, and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
